    I

    initialize(URL, ResourceBundle) - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.controller.GameScreenController
     
    initialize(URL, ResourceBundle) - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.controller.MainMenuController
     
    initModel(GameLogic) - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.controller.MainMenuController
    Inyecta el modelo.
    initModel(GameLogic, int) - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.controller.GameScreenController
    Inyecta el modelo.
    InvalidCardPlayException - Exception Class in com.example.elcincuentazo.exceptions
    Checked exception thrown when a player attempts to play a card that would cause the table sum to exceed 50.
    InvalidCardPlayException - Exception Class in com.example.elcincuentazo.model
    Checked exception thrown when a player attempts to play a card that would cause the table sum to exceed 50.
    InvalidCardPlayException(String, int, int) - Constructor for exception class com.example.elcincuentazo.exceptions.InvalidCardPlayException
    Constructs an InvalidCardPlayException with a descriptive message.
    InvalidCardPlayException(String, int, int) - Constructor for exception class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.InvalidCardPlayException
    Constructs an InvalidCardPlayException with a descriptive message.
    isActive() - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.Player
    Returns true if the player is still in the game.
    isDrawPileEmpty() - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.Deck
    Returns true if the draw pile is empty.
    isEmpty() - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.PlayerHand
    Returns true if the hand contains no cards.
    isGameOver() - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.GameLogic
    Returns true if the game has ended (only one active player remains or the game-over flag has been set).
    isGameOver() - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.GameState
    Returns true if the game has ended.
    isHuman() - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.HumanPlayer
    Always returns true because this is a human-controlled player.
    isHuman() - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.MachinePlayer
    Always returns false because this is an AI-controlled player.
    isHuman() - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.Player
    Indicates whether this player is human or machine-controlled.
    isPlayable(Card, int) - Static method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.CardValueCalculator
    Determines whether playing a given card would keep the table sum at or below 50 (i.e. the play is valid).
